name: @canopy/secure-agent
description: Safety-by-default agent factory.  Wires persistent identity + Agent (auto-SecurityLayer) + NknTransport (with useSecurityLayer + auto-HI) into a single createSecureAgent({...}) call.  Reserved opts for future safety items (mute, helloGates, signed-WebID, passphrase-vault, WebAuthn, identity-resolver, capability tokens, audit log, group encryption, Double-Ratchet PFS) so apps inherit each defence behind a checkbox — without re-wiring per app.  See Project Files/canopy-chat/security-roadmap-2026-05-23.md.
